Shall I hold you?/&nSince the Commander is here, &n I'm no longer jealous of the other sisters. &n … You'll always stay by my side, right?
1001400598.korean: 사령관 많이 피곤해?&n그러면 여기 들어와서 자도 돼.&n내가 자장가 불러줄까?/사령관은 날 사랑해 주는구나?&n… 나도 사랑해. 내가 안아줄까?/사령관이 여기 있으니,&n나 더 이상 다른 자매들이 부럽지&n않아. … 사령관은 언제나&n내 옆에 있어 줄 거지?

1001400599.english: To do philosophy, pure &n rationality is needed. For a commander &n such as you… hmm… not bad./Ah, no! Don't take my book… &n Hey, how about we go get some fresh air for a bit? &n Ah! Don't do it…/Huh? This, this is a philosophy book, &n I'm serious?!
1001400599.korean: 철학을 하는 데는, 순수한&n이성이 필요하지. 사령관&n정도면… 흠… 나쁘지 않아./아, 안돼! 내 책 가져가지 마…&n이, 있지... 우리 잠깐&n바람이라도 쐬러 나갈까?&n아! 하지마아…/엥? 이, 이거 철학 책&n맞다니까?! 진짜라니까?

1001400600.english: I heard you're good to the others too, master? Why? They're weaker than me…/I don't care about the others. &n After all, master is mine. &n I'll hold you tight and never let go./Since I promised master, &n I'll protect the others too. But can I &n lick master's face in return?
1001400600.korean: 주인님은 다른 애들한테도&n잘해준다며? 왜? 걔네들은&n나보다 약한데…/다른 애들은 신경 안 써.&n어차피 주인님은 내 거니까.&n내가 꼭 끌어안고 절대 안 놔줄 거야./주인 님이랑 약속했으니까,&n다른 애들도 지켜줄게. 그 대신&n주인님 얼굴 핥아도 돼?

1001400601.english: What if my personal feelings... &n become a hindrance to Your Majesty?/I hope to assist Your Majesty &n without lacking anything. &n And to be with Your Majesty forever…/What... should I do now? &n There are things I must do, &n but why do I keep thinking only &n of Your Majesty?
1001400601.korean: 제 개인적인 감정이... 폐하께&n방해가 되면 어쩌죠?/폐하를 보좌하는데, 부족함이&n없기를. 그리고, 언제까지나&n폐하와 함께할 수 있기를…/전... 이제 어떻게 해야 하죠?&n해야 할 일이 있는데, 어째서&n폐하의 생각만 떠오르는&n걸까요?

1001400602.english: Um… the sticker is a little squished, &n but is that still okay? &n Hehe! Yes, understood. Then… &n where should I put it? On the back of your hand? Your cheek?/The magic outfit didn't come in the right size, &n so there was no choice, but this underwear &n is the one I used to wear. &n I wear it a little tight…/I can't fulfill too unreasonable requests, &n so… please only ask occasionally. Understood?
1001400602.korean: 저… 스티커가 조금 눌렸는데&n그래도 괜찮을까요?&n후훗! 네 알겠어요. 그럼…&n어디에 붙여 드릴까요? 손등? 볼?/마법 복장은 맞는 사이즈가 없어서&n어쩔 수 없었지만, 이 속옷은 제가&n입던 게 맞아요.&n제가 조금 작게 입거든요…/너무 무리한 요구는 들어드릴 수&n없어요. 그러니까… 가끔씩만&n시켜주세요. 아셨죠?

1001400603.english: Commander? Do you want to be Count Alvis's servant? &n Then I'll let you do whatever you want!/Commander, I'm sorry Alvis bit you… Did it hurt a lot? &n I'll put some medicine on it, so just wait a moment./Huh? My Vorpal Rabbit? This &n is a gift from Valkyrie sister. &n Did it have snacks inside too?
1001400603.korean: 사령관님? 알비스 백작의 하인&n할래? 그러면 사령관님이 하고&n싶은 거 다 하게 해줄게!/사령관님. 알비스가 깨물어서&n미안해… 많이 아팠어?&n약 발라줄 테니까, 잠깐만 기다려./응? 내 보팔 래빗? 이건&n발키리 언니가 선물해 준거야.&n안에 간식도 들어있었다?

1001400604.english: Do you eat on time? &n How are you feeling today? &n Is your weight okay? &n How about your sleep? Hmm… then... why did you come here? /Until now, I was the only one here… &n What else would I do but run? Right?/Hmm… but it's a familiar. &n What was its name? … Yeah! That's right. &n ‘Cute Commander' wasn't it?
1001400604.korean: 식사는 제때 하시나요?&n오늘 기분은요?&n체중은 이상 없나요?&n수면은요? 흠… 그럼... 여긴 왜 오셨죠? /여지껏 저 혼자밖에 없었는데…&n제가 달리할 게 뭐가 있겠어요? 그쵸?/음… 그런데 퍼밀리어야.&n네 이름이 뭐였니? … 그래! 맞아.&n‘귀여운 사령관님’이었지?

1001400605.english: When the day comes that everyone is saved, &n this holy relic will no longer be needed…/O Savior, if there is anything &n that hinders you, please &n speak up anytime. I will send them &n to purgatory./You must be careful not to be corrupted by desire. &n If it gets hard, I might be able to help you.
1001400605.korean: 모든 이가 구원받는 날이 오면&n이 성물도 필요 없어지겠지요…/구원자시여, 당신을 방해하는&n게 있으면 언제든&n말씀해주시길. 제가 그들을&n연옥으로 보내겠습니다./욕망 때문에 타락하는 건&n주의하셔야 합니다. 힘드시면&n제가 도와드릴 수도 있겠군요.

1001400606.english: Are you nervous? In dreams… &n you didn't act like that, though?/Hehe… Do you remember &n what happened in the dream? Hehe… If someone &n were to find out…/No one can enter the master's dream. &n Only the master and I… &n Hehehe… What shall we do?
1001400606.korean: 긴장되시나요? 꿈에선…&n안 그러던데?/후후… 꿈에서 있었던 일…&n기억하나요? 후후… 누군가&n알기라도 하면…/주인님의 꿈만은 아무도 들어올 수&n없어요. 주인님과 저… 둘이서만…&n후후후… 뭘 해볼까요?

1001400607.english: You can ignore opinions saying it's too revealing. &n Because I've become even stronger wearing this outfit./F-For love… &n I can do anything… even if &n that means wearing even more daring clothes…/Faucre is… a precious companion. &n I'm ashamed that I doubted her…
1001400607.korean: 노출이 심하다는 의견은&n무시해도 좋아요. 전 이 옷을&n입고 더욱더 강해졌으니까요./사, 사랑을 위해서라면…&n뭐든지 할 수 있어요… 설령.&n이보다 더 한 옷을 입는 거라든지…/뽀끄루는... 소중한 동료에요.&n그녀를 의심했던 제가…&n부끄럽네요…

1001400608.english: A candy that says "Well done"... What on earth is this… I don't dislike it, but…/If another human had been my &n commander… I hate even imagining it. &n I'm truly glad the last human was my commander./Even seeing my flaws, &n my commander doesn't get disappointed. &n ...That puts my heart at ease a little.
1001400608.korean: ‘참 잘했어요’ 사탕이라니… 이건&n대체… 싫은 건, 아니지만…/만약 다른 인간님이 제&n사령관이었다면… 상상하기도&n싫어요. &n마지막 인간님이 사령관이라서&n정말 다행이에요./사령관은 제 부족한 부분을&n보고도 실망하지 않으시네요.&n...조금, 마음이 놓여요.

1001400609.english: I've stepped on countless failures. &n And climbed all the way up here. &n What do you think of someone like me?/After meeting you… my thoughts &n have changed a bit. &n The only one who can satisfy me… &n is still you./Ha… You're mine now. &n Alive or dead… &n I'll never let you go.
1001400609.korean: 난 수많은 실패작들을 밟고.&n여기까지 올라왔지.&n당신은 이런 날 어떻게 생각해?/당신을 만나고… 생각이 조금&n바뀌었어.&n날 만족시켜 줄 수 있는 건…&n역시 당신뿐이야./하아… 당신은 이제 내 거야.&n살아서도... 죽어서도…&n절대 놓치지 않겠어.

1001400610.english: Yes, I like listening to songs. Here, &n earpods… it's my favorite song. &n They say Sleipnir sang it... let's listen together./Senpai taught me a lot… now I think I know &n what this feeling is... but I won't tell &n senpai./Senpai, I'm sleepy… let's sleep together. &n ...Can I lean on you?
1001400610.korean: 응, 노래 듣는 거 좋아해. 자,&n이어폰… 제일 좋아하는 노래야.&n슬레이프니르가 불렀대... 같이&n듣자./선배님이 많이 알려줘서… 나 이&n기분이 뭔지... 알 것 같아.&n선배님한테는... 말 안해줄거야./선배님, 나 졸린데… 같이 자자.&n…기대도, 돼?

1001400611.english: Hmm, I've definitely softened since becoming an adult. &n Do you want to touch me too?/Now that I'm an adult, I'm going to do &n whatever I want. &n You don't mind, right?/Hehe, your face turned red? &n All that effort was worth it~ watch me a &n little longer, okay?
1001400611.korean: 으음, 확실히 어른이 되니까&n말랑말랑해졌어. 오빠도&n만져볼래?/이제 나도 어른이니까, 하고&n싶은 건 다 해버릴 거야.&n오빠도 좋지?/헤헷, 오빠 얼굴 빨개졌네?&n고생한 보람이 있었어~ 좀 더&n봐줘. 응?

1001400612.english: Why, why do you keep asking only me… I, I want Captain Kan &n to get together with the commander…/Hehe, hehehe… haa, commander… &n if you keep doing that… aah, I don't know… &n Ah?! Where did you hear up to…?/You're that curious? Here. &n This is a direct recording of the commander's voice. &n Listening to it makes me so happy… huh? &n You won't listen?
1001400612.korean: 왜, 왜 자꾸 저한테만… 저, 저는 칸&n대장님이 사령관님이랑&n맺어졌으면 좋겠다구요…/후후, 후후후… 하아, 사령관님…&n그렇게 하시면… 아잉, 몰라요오…&n흐앗?! 어, 어디까지 들으셨죠…?/그렇게 궁금하세요? 여기요. 직접&n녹음한 사령관님 음성이에요. 듣고&n있으면 너무 행복… 네?&n안 들으신다구요?

1001400613.english: I will review today's operation meeting contents. &n ... How does the commander think of me… Ah, it's nothing! Nothing…/Wherever that place is… &n I am ready to follow the commander…/I, I don't enjoy summary executions! &n That's a bad joke... Pl-please don't tease me... commander…
1001400613.korean: 금일 작전 회의 내용을 보고&n하겠습니다. ... 사령관님께서는&n절 어떻게 생각하고… 아, 아무것도&n아닙니다! 아무것도…/그곳이 어디가 되었든… &n전 사령관님을 따라갈 준비가 되어&n있습니다…/제, 제가 즉결 처형을 즐긴다니요!&n질 나쁜 농담입니다... 노, 놀리지&n말아 주십시오... 사령관님…

1001400614.english: Please get intoxicated by my presence instead of champagne. I think it's enough, but what do you think? &n You can't take your eyes off me. No, stay just like that. Hehe, why do you think I made a dress from this material? &n Enjoy it as much as you like. &n Stay close by my side. &n Commander, you are the completion of my fashion.
1001400614.korean: 샴페인 대신 제 모습에&n취해보세요. 충분하다고&n생각하는데, 당신 생각은?/눈을 떼지 못하시는군요. 아뇨,&n그대로 있어요. 후후, 제가 왜 이런&n소재로 드레스를 만들었겠어요?&n마음껏 감상하시죠./옆에 꼭 붙어 있어요.&n사령관이야말로 제 패션의&n완성이니까.

1001400615.english: Don't keep staring. Then I'll want to move on to the next step after the meal right away. &n I understand your feelings, master. More than the cooking… something else is more urgent, right? &n I will never leave the master. &n … Anyway, like this, we can't even go outside.
1001400615.korean: 자꾸 보지 마세요. 그럼 식사 다음&n단계로 바로 넘어가고 싶어져요./주인님 마음은 알아요. 요리보다…&n다른 게 더 급하신 거죠?/절대로 주인님과는 떨어지지&n않아요. … 어차피 이렇게는&n바깥에 나갈 수도 없는 걸요?

1001400616.english: Ugh… I'll show you the results of my training… master, you can just stay still… &n I'm not embarrassed anymore. &n More than that… how is it? &n Did I help you a little… master? &n I'm happiest when I cook for the master. &n I can only grill for now though…
1001400616.korean: 우으… 훈련의 성과를&n보여드릴게요… 주인님은&n가만히 계셔도 돼요…/이, 이제 부끄럽진 않아요.&n그보다도… 어, 어떤가요?&n저도 조금은… 주인님께&n도움이 됐나요?/주인님께 요리를 해드릴 때가&n제일 기뻐요. 아직 굽는 것&n밖에 못하지만…

1001400617.english: Commander? I heard that to really become family… there's something you absolutely have to do… can you do it…? &n Sh-shower? In that case… I'm family too! Can I come in with you…? &n Huh? That's... not allowed...? &n Wearing this… my heart is pounding. &n Am I… strange?
1001400617.korean: 저… 사령관님? 진짜 가족이 되기&n위해선… 꼭 해야만 하는 일이&n있다고 들었는데… 해주실 수…&n있나요?/샤, 샤워요? 그렇다면… 저도&n가족이니까! 제가 같이 들어가도…&n네? 그건... 안되는... 건가요?/이렇게 입고 있으니… 가슴이&n두근거려요. 제가… 이상한&n걸까요?

1001400618.english: Ugh… whispering like that in my ear… &n I think I'm getting used to the master's touch now. But just to try… can you hug me once..? &n Ah… &n You want to see my eyes, little concubine… &n Then… I-I must have made you uncomfortable. &n I'll step back now… &n …Y-yes.
1001400618.korean: 읏… 그렇게 귓가에 속삭이시면…/이젠 주인님의 손길에 익숙해진&n것 같습니다. 그래도 시험삼아…&n한 번 안아 주실 수 있으신지요..?&n앗…/소첩의 눈이 보고싶으시다니…&n그럼… 부, 불쾌하게 해드렸군요.&n그만 물러가겠…&n…그렇, 습니까.

1001400619.english: Don't worry. I will protect you, master. &n You don't have to bear everything alone. &n I will help you. &n Ma-master? If you keep staring at me like that… it's troubling…
1001400619.korean: 걱정 마세요. 주인님은 제가&n지켜 드릴 테니까요./주인님께서 모든 걸 혼자&n짊어지실 필요는 없어요. 제가&n도와드릴게요./주, 주인님? 그렇게 빤히&n쳐다보시면… 곤란해요…

1001400620.english: Hmm? … Are you excited looking at me? &n Hehehe… How cute… &n Ah… Thanks for the gratitude, now hurry up and do whatever you want… &n Come on… &n You? After you untie this ribbon... what are you planning to do to me? Ah… I'm really looking forward to it.
1001400620.korean: 으음? … 날 보고 흥분한 거야?&n후후후… 귀여워라…/아아... 감사 인사는 됐으니, 어서&n당신이 하고 싶은 대로 해 봐…&n어서…/당신? 이 리본을 풀고 나면... 날&n어떻게 할 생각이지? 아아… 이거&n정말 기대되는걸?

1001400621.english: Just for today, I'll let you taste this much. Just, only this far! &n W-what? Just staring blankly… it's even more embarrassing… &n I'm glad the commander is watching over me even like this… &n Though it was a mistake…
1001400621.korean: 오늘만 특별히 여기까지&n맛보게 해줄거야. 따, 딱&n여기까지야!/뭐, 뭐야. 멀뚱히 보기만&n하면… 더 부끄럽다구…/이렇게라도 사령관이&n봐주니까 다행이야…&n실수이긴 했지만…

1001400622.english: Every time I talk with the commander, there are more and more things I can't understand… It's a little troublesome. &n I'm glad I got upgraded. Now I can touch the commander's cheek, hold hands too. &n Even if it's just a hologram, the commander treats me equally with others. &n What is this feeling…?
1001400622.korean: 사령관님과 이야기할 때마다, 제가&n이해할 수 없는 것들이 점점&n늘어나서… 조금, 곤란합니다./업그레이드 받길 잘했다는 생각이&n들어요. 이렇게 사령관님의 볼을&n만질수도, 손을 잡을 수도&n있으니까요./이런 홀로그램이라도 사령관님은&n다른 분들과 동등하게&n대해주시는군요. 이 감정은…&n뭘까요?

1001400788.korean: 뭐, 정 손이 가는 거면… 특별히&n허락해 줄게.

1001400789.english: What? Could this be the end?

1001400790.english: Is it okay if I pretend not to know?

1001400792.english: You naughty commander. No way. &n I have no choice but to be naughty too...

1001400793.english: … I'll close my eyes. No… I &n don't know anything, I'm just closing my eyes...
1001400793.korean: … 눈감아 줄 테니까. 아니… 난&n아무것도 몰라 눈 감고 있어서...

1001400794.english: Well, a man should at least &n have that much guts.

1001400795.english: Now, what command &n do you want?

1001400796.english: This, this much is easy for me.

1001400797.english: Since the commander is on my side… um… &n I'll allow a little.

1001400798.english: C-commander!? Ah~! Really… that's too much.

1001400799.english: Keep… stroking me… &n My heart is pounding… I &n like it.

1001400801.english: If the commander wants it, &n I can endure it.

1001400802.english: Commander… what are you thinking &n about?

1001400804.english: What… should I do now? &n Should I stay still?
1001400804.korean: 이… 이제 어떻게 하는 게 좋아?&n가만히… 있을까?

1001400806.english: I feel like a fairy walking with a hero.&nIs Aqua that kind of presence to the master?&nIf so, I think I'd really be happy.
1001400806.korean: 영웅과 함께 다니는 요정이 된 기분이야.&n아쿠아가 주인님한테 그런 존재야?&n그럼 정말 기쁠 것 같은데.

1001400807.english: Haa… can't stand it? Shall we &n go somewhere... quiet?
1001400807.korean: 하아… 못 참겠어? 우리&n어디... 조용한 곳이라도 갈까?

1001400808.english: I'll slightly cover you… &n Please… freely…

1001400809.english: Just a little... slowly… it's too rushed…

1001400810.english: Then… do you feel good? &n What kind of feeling?
